subcodes.first_line: O Na'ím! Upon thee be the glory of God, the Lord of the worlds. We have remembered thee aforetime and at this hour, and We beseech God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا نعیم علیک بهاءالله رب العالمین انا ذکرناک من قبل و فی هذا الحین و نسئل الله
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @prayer for nearness to God, @spiritual transformation, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
